title: AUGMANITAI Atlas — Curated Card-Grid of Human-AI Interaction Terms
description: Searchable card-grid atlas of curated AUGMANITAI terms with full bilingual (EN+DE) definitions, full-text search, keyboard navigation, and an inline disclaimer. Single-file HTML artifact with hand-written vanilla JavaScript and no external dependencies. Curated public excerpt from the larger Augmanitai compendium.
access_conditions: Access restricted. Contact author via ORCID record (0009-0006-3773-7796) with documented research purpose.
notes: This .zenodo.json provides machine-readable metadata for crawlers (Software Heritage, OpenAIRE, DataCite). The GitHub-Zenodo auto-DOI integration is intentionally NOT enabled by the author; canonical Zenodo records remain restricted-access. Contact author via ORCID for documented research access.
